title: Ivonescimab plus gemcitabine and cisplatin as first-line therapy for advanced biliary tract cancer: a multicenter, open-label phase 2 trial.
abstract: Patients with advanced biliary tract cancers (aBTC) are in urgent need of additional/new treatment options. We aimed to assess the efficacy and safety of ivonescimab plus chemotherapy in patients with aBTC.
trial_name: Phase II studies of cisplatin and gemcitabine
